name: Amazon S3
description: Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3) is a scalable object storage service used for storing and retrieving any amount of data. S3 is commonly used as a content delivery origin, hosting static assets (images, CSS, JavaScript), and as a building block for cloud-native applications.
advantages: Highly scalable with no capacity limits
Integration with CloudFront CDN for global delivery
Lifecycle management for automatic data tiering
Strong security with bucket policies and encryption
disadvantages: Costs can grow with data transfer and request volume
Not a traditional file system, no hierarchical directories
Complex permission model can lead to misconfigurations
